THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA,N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT NEYMAN, IRINA $16,708.85 PRINCIPAL, $340.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,048.85, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE OBJECTIONS RAISED ARE ISSUES THAT WERE OR SHOULD HAVE BEEN ADDRESSED IN THE ARBITRATION. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED NO GROUNDS FOR THE REJECTION OF THE AWARD. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA, N.A.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. The objections raised are issues that were or should have been addressed in the arbitration. Defendant has presented no grounds for the rejection of the award. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/PB)
